PreToolUse :: Agent.reason: Current layered agent-governance stack; prevent more Agent pre-hook fan-out until dispatcher consolidation lands.

SessionStart :: *.reason: Global startup hooks are intentionally broad today; hold the line until domain gating is implemented.

PostToolUse :: Agent.reason: Agent post-hooks are already noisy; fail further growth until the chain is reduced.

PreToolUse :: Bash.reason: Bash pre-hooks are now dispatched per domain; fail any attempt to reintroduce broad Salesforce Bash fan-out.

UserPromptSubmit :: *.reason: Prompt-time routing and deprecation notices are global today; keep the current ceiling including the data-hygiene deprecation warning hook.

PreToolUse :: Write.reason: Write hooks are already layered across domains; this budget prevents quiet growth.

PostToolUse :: Bash.reason: Post-Bash hooks are now dispatched per domain; fail any attempt to reintroduce broad Bash post-hook fan-out.

Stop :: *.reason: Global stop hooks are capped until session-stop behavior is consolidated.
